title: rosa canina subvar. hispidula
intro: Rosa canina subvar. hispidula, also known as the wild rose, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is characterized by its thorny stems and fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina subvar. hispidula include its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa canina subvar. hispidula include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, sore throats, and skin conditions. Rosa canina subvar. hispidula can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is also used in skincare products due to its antibacterial and anti-aging properties.
